_note: Team-curated. Verify all entries before citing. Update manually as new deals close.

deals.intent: Brings premium racing shock and suspension IP in-house for the RZR Pro R platform and future high-performance UTVs; simultaneously restricts competitors from accessing a key performance supplier.

Adds fleet asset-tracking and telematics software to Deere's connected equipment ecosystem; directly relevant to commercial Gator buyers in construction, landscaping, and agriculture who manage large vehicle fleets.

partnerships.intent: CFMOTO produces KTM and Husqvarna models in China and co-develops off-road platforms; CFMOTO gains engineering credibility and access to European performance DNA, while KTM secures cost-competitive manufacturing at scale.

Joint development of hydrogen-combustion internal combustion engines as an alternative propulsion path alongside battery EV; signals these OEMs are hedging against full electrification in powersports and preserving the ICE experience for recreation-oriented buyers.
